svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-03-23: Gentlemen ransomware, zero-trust visibility, EQST

g.text: Spread via Veeam backup creds harvested from prior breach
Telemetry blind spots delay ransomware containment by days
Quarterly report flags Korea-targeted lateral-movement TTPs
